overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a modern sunlit city with palm trees and high-rise buildings. The character navigates covered sidewalks, climbs over a wooden barrier, crosses a street with buses, and approaches a tunnel entrance labeled Horizon Plaza.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the shaded sidewalk next to a concrete wall, passing parked cars and palm trees

large orange and white advertisement sign mounted on the wall
tall skyscraper with reflective glass facade visible in the distance
tall palm trees lining the street side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a partially shaded urban sidewalk bordered by a high concrete retaining wall on the left and a street with parked cars on the right. A large Ginger Fix billboard is visible on the wall, and modern glass towers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza transition area with historic building view

exits covered sidewalk into open sunlit plaza with clear view of historic building

zebra-striped pedestrian crossing leading across the street

segments.scene_description: The character climbs over a wooden barrier, transitioning from the covered sidewalk into a bright open plaza. A historic white building with red awnings becomes visible across the street, and the character approaches a crosswalk.

events.description: character crosses the street at the crosswalk between a parked bus and truck

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the sunlit street at a crosswalk, passing between a green and white city bus and a yellow delivery truck. The historic white building remains visible to the left while modern towers rise ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza leading to covered Horizon Plaza entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the dark tunnel entrance of Horizon Plaza, passing purple banners

vertical purple and gold banners hanging from poles along the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide concrete plaza lined with palm trees and purple banners, heading toward the dark covered entrance of Horizon Plaza. The scene transitions from bright sunlight to the shadowed tunnel approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban environment that transitions from a shaded sidewalk into a bright open plaza and finally toward a shadowed tunnel. It begins with the character walking along a partially shaded sidewalk bordered by a high concrete wall and a Ginger Fix billboard, with modern glass towers looming in the background. As the character climbs over a wooden barrier, the scene opens into a bright plaza where a historic white building with red awnings becomes visible across the street. The camera then follows the character across a sunlit crosswalk, passing between a green and white city bus and a yellow delivery truck before moving across a wide concrete plaza lined with palm trees and purple banners. Finally, the lighting shifts from brilliant sunlight to deep shadow as the character approaches the dark covered entrance of Horizon Plaza.
